verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've got a fire I've got a fire burning Burning inside of me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I've got a fire I've got a fire burning Burning inside of me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Your presence is my passion When You capture my gaze, You set me ablaze With Your

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Fire, fire, fire Ever burning, all consuming Fire, fire, fire You baptized me With Your Spirit and fire

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: In Your presence, when I'm at Your throne It's like fire, shut up in my bones You're the One, the One that I desire You're the all consuming fire
